title: Message area component that renders content in a styled container
purpose: Provides a reusable UI component for displaying message content within a styled div element, allowing for custom styling through className prop.
module_context: Exports a functional React component named MessageArea that accepts content and optional className props, and returns a div element with message-area class and any provided custom classes.

steps.content: Accept content and optional className props.
Render a div element with message-area base class.
Append any provided custom className to the base class.
Insert the provided content as the div's child.
